Container.Name: discord-mute-bot
Container.Overview: Discord bot with slash commands for muting, vote-muting, russian roulette, and reaction roles. Runs on Node.js with low resource usage (~30-40 MB RAM).

Config.Name: Bot Token
Config.Description: Your Discord bot token from the Developer Portal.

Config.Name: Data
Config.Description: Persistent storage for reaction role mappings. Required so role panels survive container restarts and updates.
